queries.by_type:
select relation_type,count(*) as relation_count,
       sum(case when reason is null or trim(reason)='' then 1 else 0 end) as lacking_reason_count
from task_relations group by relation_type order by relation_count desc, relation_type
queries.duplicate_relation_type_needs:
with pairs as (
 select case when task_id<related_to then task_id else related_to end as endpoint_a,
        case when task_id<related_to then related_to else task_id end as endpoint_b,
        relation_type, task_id, related_to, reason
 from task_relations
)
select endpoint_a, endpoint_b, count(*) as edge_count, count(distinct relation_type) as relation_type_count,
       group_concat(task_id || '->' || related_to || ':' || relation_type || coalesce(' [' || reason || ']',''), ' || ') as edges
from pairs group by endpoint_a, endpoint_b
having count(distinct relation_type)>1
order by relation_type_count desc, edge_count desc, endpoint_a, endpoint_b
queries.lacking_reasons_examples:
select r.task_id, t.title as task_title, r.related_to, rt.title as related_title, r.relation_type
from task_relations r
left join tasks t on t.id=r.task_id
left join tasks rt on rt.id=r.related_to
where r.reason is null or trim(r.reason)=''
order by r.relation_type, r.task_id, r.related_to
limit 25
queries.multi_saga_membership_conflicts:
with saga_tasks as (
 select id,title,status from tasks where type='saga' or labels_json like '%"saga"%'
), memberships as (
 select r.related_to as member_id, mt.title as member_title, mt.status as member_status,
        r.task_id as saga_id, st.title as saga_title, st.status as saga_status
 from task_relations r join saga_tasks st on st.id=r.task_id
 left join tasks mt on mt.id=r.related_to
 where r.relation_type='groups'
)
select member_id, member_title, member_status, count(distinct saga_id) as saga_count,
       group_concat(saga_id || ': ' || saga_title, ' || ') as sagas
from memberships group by member_id having count(distinct saga_id)>1 order by saga_count desc, member_id
queries.reciprocal_duplicate_edges:
with pairs as (
 select case when task_id<related_to then task_id else related_to end as endpoint_a,
        case when task_id<related_to then related_to else task_id end as endpoint_b,
        relation_type, task_id, related_to, reason
 from task_relations
)
select endpoint_a, endpoint_b, count(*) as edge_count, count(distinct relation_type) as relation_type_count,
       group_concat(task_id || '->' || related_to || ':' || relation_type || coalesce(' [' || reason || ']',''), ' || ') as edges
from pairs group by endpoint_a, endpoint_b
having count(*)>1
order by relation_type_count desc, edge_count desc, endpoint_a, endpoint_b
queries.relation_totals:
select count(*) as total_relations,
       count(distinct task_id || char(31) || related_to) as directed_pairs,
       sum(case when reason is null or trim(reason)='' then 1 else 0 end) as lacking_reasons
from task_relations
